title: Top B.Ed College in Noida, Uttar Pradesh | Galgotias University
content: School of Education, Galgotias University is offering a Full Time and Regular Face to Face Two Academic Years (Four Semesters) duration Undergraduate Program of Bachelor of Education, generally known as B.Ed. It is a pre-service professional teacher education program that prepares teachers for secondary and senior secondary schools. Minimum 50% marks either in bachelor or master degree in science/ social science/ humanities/ commerce/ B.Tech.with specialization in Science and Mathematics with 55% marks or any other qualification equivalent thereto. (5% relaxation in marks for SC/ST candidates) Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 01 Disciplinary and Pedagogical Expertise: The student-teacher demonstrates a strong foundation in subject knowledge, curriculum understanding, and pedagogical skills to design and deliver effective, learner-centered educational experiences. 02 Assessment and Reflective Practice: The student-teacher employs a range of assessment tools and strategies to monitor learner progress and use reflective practices to improve teaching effectiveness and professional growth. 03 Understanding Contemporary Educational Contexts: The student-teacher exhibits critical awareness of the aims, policies, and current challenges in Indian and global education systems and contributes meaningfully to educational reforms and national development. 04 Digital Literacy and Communication: The student-teacher utilises digital tools, ICT, and effective communication strategies to promote active learning, collaboration, and inclusive classroom interactions. 05 Education and Social Transformation: The student-teacher recognises the interdependence of education and society, and actively engages in fostering equity, inclusiveness, and social transformation through educational practice. 06 Ethics and Inclusion: The student-teacher upholds ethical standards, demonstrates sensitivity to diversity, and creates inclusive learning environments that respect cultural, gender, and social differences. 07 Lifelong Learning and Professional Development: The student-teacher engages in continuous learning and professional development to adapt to evolving educational trends, technologies, and societal needs. 01 Graduates shall take up a successful career as a school teacher and be leaders in their organisation. 02 Graduates shall design and practice modern tools for an effective teaching-learning process. 03 Graduates shall enrich their stature by engaging themselves in higher education and as a researcher in multidisciplinary fields. 01 Students shall be able to use Education 5.0 in their pedagogical analysis. 02 Students shall be able to groom their personalities as skilled teachers. Minimum 50% marks either in bachelor or master degree in science/ social science/ humanities/ commerce/ B.Tech.with specialization in Science and Mathematics with 55% marks or any other qualification equivalent thereto. (5% relaxation in marks for SC/ST candidates) Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list
